manuscript_ref.description: Path to the source manuscript text for this run

tone.description: Free-text tone label, e.g. gothic-suspense; maps to config/audio_spec.yaml tone->music-tag table

pacing.description: Must match a preset in config/editorial_vocab.yaml

screenplay_frontend.description: Opt-in (default false): run the 02_1_screenplay -> 02_2_scene_extraction front-end to regenerate the scene set from prose, instead of the marker-split scenes from 01_manuscript_ingestion. Added 2026-07-24.

base_chapter.description: Fallback chapter number for 02_2_scene_extraction when a source scene_id has no ch<N>_sc<M> form. Optional.

base_scene.description: Fallback base scene number for 02_2_scene_extraction. Optional.
